game_name: Dungeons & Dragons: Eye of the Beholder
extraction_note: The Wikipedia source provides game development and release information but contains no documented music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions), track listings, area-specific audio data, or SFX characteristics. Only general audio references are noted: '150+ Adlib sound effects exist' and sound was praised for 'giving the feeling of being in an actual dungeon', but no specific musical parameters are documented.
